name: Remotely Install Borealis Agent
description: Connects to remotely targeted device(s) via SSH and installs the Borealis Agent onto the device with preconfigured serverURL and enrollment code at runtime.

variables.name: bootstrap_url
variables.label: Bootstrap URL
variables.description: Declare where the bootstrap script is located remotely.

variables.name: server_url
variables.label: Borealis Engine URL
variables.description: The FQDN / IP URL to the Borealis engine.

variables.name: enrollment_code
variables.label: Enrollment Code
variables.description: Site-specific enrollment code to be used by the agent.
